faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about Auditora.ai.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions

urlLimitations.question: If it only reads my public website, how can it identify real risks?
urlLimitations.answer: The initial diagnostic identifies structural and logical risks based on industry patterns and the inferred process structure. These are well-founded hypotheses, not operational findings. The precision of the analysis increases significantly when you use the guided conversation or the full platform with actual operational context.

vsChatgpt.question: How is this different from using ChatGPT to generate processes?
vsChatgpt.answer: Auditora.ai differs in three key aspects. First, methodology: every session follows the SIPOC framework with automatic coverage gap detection. Second, deliverables: diagrams generated are real BPMN 2.0, exportable to XML, not approximate representations. Third, persistence: processes, risks, and mitigations are stored, tracked, and evolve in a structured manner.

dataAccess.question: What data do you access from my website exactly?
dataAccess.answer: The text content of up to 5 public pages is analyzed: homepage, about, services, and similar. This is the same content visible to any visitor in a browser. No internal systems, APIs, databases, or protected areas are accessed.

bpmKnowledge.question: Do I need BPM or BPMN knowledge to use the tool?
bpmKnowledge.answer: No. Auditora.ai is designed so that anyone with knowledge of their business can use it. The AI formulates relevant questions in accessible language and technical notation is generated automatically. For consultants with BPM experience, the tool accelerates the documentation process. For those without technical training, the platform manages the methodological complexity.

deepening.question: Can I go deeper than the instant report?
deepening.answer: Yes. After the initial diagnostic, you can start a guided conversation with the AI. The platform asks specific questions about operations — suppliers, inputs, activities, outputs, customers — and builds a progressively more detailed analysis. The result includes a complete FMEA with failure modes and Risk Priority Number (RPN) per activity.

dataSecurity.question: Is my data secure?
dataSecurity.answer: Yes. All information is transmitted with TLS encryption and stored encrypted at rest. Anonymous sessions expire in 24 hours. Information provided is not used to train AI models. When you create an account, data is stored in your organization's private workspace with complete isolation.

accountMigration.question: What happens to my analysis if I create an account?
accountMigration.answer: All information generated during the anonymous session — process map, risk analysis, guided conversation, and deliverables — transfers automatically to the account without data loss.

vsProcessMining.question: Is this process mining?
vsProcessMining.answer: No. Process mining analyzes system logs (ERP, CRM) to discover how processes actually execute. Auditora.ai is an elicitation-based process discovery tool: it guides structured conversations to document processes and analyze risks. These are complementary approaches. Process mining requires system data; Auditora.ai works with human knowledge.

simulations.question: What are Harvard-style simulations?
simulations.answer: AI-generated decision scenarios based on your actual process maps and identified risks. Each scenario presents realistic operational dilemmas where team members make choices under pressure. The system scores their decisions across three dimensions: alignment with procedures, risk awareness, and decision criteria. Think of it as a flight simulator for operations teams.

procedures.question: Can Auditora generate standard operating procedures?
procedures.answer: Yes. Once processes are documented, AI generates versioned SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) with objectives, scope, responsible parties, step-by-step instructions, controls, and KPIs. You review and approve each version before publishing.

hero.title: Turn any organization into a living process map
hero.subtitle: Discover processes, assess risks, generate procedures, and simulate decisions — all powered by AI and grounded in proven methodology.
hero.subtext: No signup required. Enter a URL and get a SIPOC map + risk assessment in 2 minutes.

problem.title: Your competitors are mapping processes 8x faster
problem.statLabel: % of organizations lack documented processes for critical operations

pain1.title: Weeks lost to interviews
pain1.description: Traditional process discovery requires 3-6 weeks of interviews and multiple revision rounds before you have a usable map.

pain2.title: Diagrams that die on day one
pain2.description: Visio and PowerPoint diagrams become obsolete the moment operations change. No versioning, no traceability.

pain3.title: Risks hiding in plain sight
pain3.description: Without structured FMEA analysis, critical failure modes go undetected until they become incidents.

productFlow.title: One platform. Six capabilities. Zero fragmentation.
productFlow.subtitle: Replace spreadsheets, whiteboards, and five different tools with one AI-powered consulting workspace.

step1.title: Discover
step1.description: Scan a company website or start a guided conversation. AI generates an initial SIPOC map and risk assessment in minutes.

step2.title: Map
step2.description: Transform conversations into interactive BPMN 2.0 diagrams in real time. Compatible with Camunda, Signavio, and any BPMN tool.

step3.title: Assess
step3.description: FMEA matrix, 5×5 heat maps, risk registers with mitigations and controls — automated, not spreadsheet-driven.

step4.title: Document
step4.description: Generate versioned SOPs from your process documentation. AI writes the procedures, you review and approve.

step5.title: Simulate
step5.description: Test your team's decision-making with AI-generated Harvard-style scenarios based on your actual processes and risks.

step6.title: Evaluate
step6.description: Measure human risk across your organization with scored simulations, strength/risk area analysis, and team-wide dashboards.

simulation.title: Test your team before a crisis tests them
simulation.subtitle: AI generates decision scenarios from your actual BPMN processes and identified risks. Your people make decisions under pressure. You measure their readiness.
simulation.exampleQuestion: A supplier delivers contaminated raw material. As the COO, do you:
simulation.exampleOptionA: A) Stop the production line immediately and notify the quality team
simulation.exampleOptionB: B) Quarantine the batch and switch to backup supplier
simulation.exampleOptionC: C) Run quality tests and continue production pending results

feature1.title: Grounded in your reality
feature1.description: Scenarios are generated from your actual process maps, not generic templates. Each decision tests a real operational risk.

feature2.title: Role-specific evaluation
feature2.description: Scenarios tailored for CEOs, COOs, CFOs, Operations Directors, Quality Managers, and custom roles.

feature3.title: Measurable human risk
feature3.description: Scores across three dimensions: alignment, risk level, and decision criteria. Track individual and team-wide readiness.

features.title: Everything a consulting engagement needs
features.subtitle: From discovery to evaluation — one platform replaces your entire toolkit.

feature1.title: AI Process Discovery
feature1.description: Scan a website or guide a conversation. AI maps SIPOC structure, identifies industry patterns, and detects risks automatically.

feature2.title: BPMN 2.0 Diagrams
feature2.description: Professional diagrams built in real time. Export XML, PNG, PDF. Compatible with Camunda, Signavio, Bizagi.

feature3.title: Risk Assessment
feature3.description: FMEA matrix, heat maps, risk registers with mitigations, controls, and residual risk tracking.

feature4.title: AI Elicitation
feature4.description: AI detects gaps in your process map and asks targeted questions. Each answer closes a specific gap.

feature5.title: Procedure Generation
feature5.description: AI writes versioned SOPs from process documentation. Review, approve, publish workflow.

feature6.title: Harvard-Style Simulations
feature6.description: Decision scenarios generated from real processes. Score team readiness and identify training gaps.

howItWorks.title: From URL to process map in 3 steps

step1.title: Enter any company URL
step1.description: Paste the website of the organization you want to analyze.

step2.title: AI analyzes in real time
step2.description: The system crawls public pages, identifies the industry, services, and operational structure.

step3.title: Get SIPOC + risk assessment
step3.description: Receive an initial process map with risk scores and a downloadable PDF report.

useCases.title: Built for the people who map the world's processes

tab1.label: Consultants
tab1.title: Deliver faster, win more engagements
tab1.description: Replace weeks of manual interviews with AI-powered discovery. Generate stakeholder-ready deliverables in hours, not months. The complete engagement lifecycle in one platform.

tab2.label: Auditors
tab2.title: Audit with evidence, not assumptions
tab2.description: Structured SIPOC methodology provides full traceability for internal and external audits. FMEA matrices with RPN scoring. Risk registers with mitigation tracking. Export professional audit reports.

tab3.label: Operations
tab3.title: Operational excellence, systematized
tab3.description: Map every critical process, identify hidden risks, generate standardized procedures. Simulate decision scenarios to evaluate team readiness before incidents occur.

finalCta.title: Your first process map is 2 minutes away
finalCta.subtitle: No signup. No credit card. Enter a URL and see what Auditora.ai can discover about any organization.
finalCta.note: Free diagnostic includes SIPOC map, risk assessment, and PDF report.

pillar1.title: SIPOC (Six Sigma)
pillar1.description: Standard framework for process mapping: Suppliers, Inputs, Process, Outputs, Customers. We automate the structure that senior consultants already use.

pillar2.title: BPMN 2.0 (OMG)
pillar2.description: Industry standard notation for business process modeling. Interoperable and exportable diagrams.

pillar3.title: FMEA (Failure Mode Analysis)
pillar3.description: Systematic methodology for identifying and prioritizing risks. We automate the calculation of Severity, Occurrence, Detection, and RPN.
